title: On-screen assessment: the evidence base for Ofqual’s consultation
body: "This short report summarises 4 research studies published alongside Ofqual’s consultation on regulating on-screen assessment in GCSEs, AS and A levels. Together, these studies explore the opportunities, benefits, risks, and challenges of on-screen assessment. The findings provide a comprehensive evidence base and have directly informed Ofqual’s proposed regulatory approach. "
